summary: A pass-through that marks a clean output point in a CHOP chain. Best practice is to end CHOP networks with a Null for stable export referencing.

key_params.name: cook
key_params.note: Cook behavior: Always, Off, or dependent on exports/viewers

common_gotchas: Always name your Null CHOPs descriptively (e.g., null_audio_level) so exports and references remain clear.
